stem_zh:
1. 影响经营有效性：lead to/ result in losing potential sales/ reduced cash flows/ overpayment/ additional cost/non-business related items; asset/ cash being easily misappropriated; reduce customer/supplier/employee goodwill; increases the risk of fraudulent transaction; fraud/ errors may not be identified on a timely basis. 2. 影响财报真实公允：resulting in the XX科目 in the financial statements being under or overstated; incomplete XX data being recorded into the accounting system;  3. 未做到合法合规：result in fines or penalties 解释关键控制：将上述解释中lead to/ result in 替换为 ensure; increase risk 替换为 reduce risk  Tips for TOC (Inspect + Reperform + Enquiry + Observe)： 1. 只询问enquiry，或者只观察observe，考官不给分！要搭配其他程序使用。 2. 有留下痕迹的文件，就抽文件+检查留痕 Select sample of XX and inspect signature as evidence. 3. Sequence check、reconciliation，常用observe + reperform，看别人做+自己再重新做一下来验证。 4. 跟系统相关的，可以使用test data。  以下是常见的缺陷考点答题模板，建议考生背诵 Weakness Recommendation Test of control S.O GDN不连续编号 （0.5） Without sequential numbers, it is difficult to identify missing orders and to monitor if all orders are being dispatched in a timely manner. If they are not, this could lead to a loss of customer goodwill. （0.5）
All XX (未连续编号的单据) should be sequentially numbered and on a regular basis a sequence check should be performed. 得分点： 建议连续编号 定期进行序列性检查
Re-perform the control by undertaking a sequence check of 题目中的交易(sales/purchase). Discuss any gaps in the sequence with XX staff. Enquire of the XX clerk as to the frequency of the sequence check. Tips: 考试中上述程序3选2 P.O GRN不连续 –This could result in a significant level of unfulfilled orders leading to stock-outs and a consequent loss of sales. （0.5） Inventory count sheet不连续 –If sheets are missing, then the inventory records could be understated. （0.5）
应收/应付/银行存款对账没有每个月对一次 reconciliation not performed monthly. （0.5） This may increase the risk of fraud. And error or fraud cannot be identified in a timely manner. （0.5）
Reconciliations should be performed on a monthly basis for all and these should be reviewed by a responsible official. 得分点： 定期对账 更高级别人员检查
Review the file of reconciliations to ensure that they are being performed on a regular basis and that they have been reviewed by a responsible official. Re-perform a sample of the reconciliations to ensure that they have been carried out appropriately.
No segregation of duty. Payroll和HR，purchase和payment，工资计算/决定与发放没有做好权责分离。 （0.5） This may increase the risk of fraud and error and misappropriation due to inside job. （0.5）
Segregation of duty should be set between A and B. A should …… + B should ……  得分点： 提出要做权责分离 具体建议每个人分别做什么
Observe which member of staff undertakes the processing of XX and confirm this is not the XX clerk. Inspect a copy of the company’s organisation chart to identify if these tasks have now been allocated to different roles.
Master file altered by a clerk 重要的主文件由普通员工修改，主文件（price list，credit，payroll）（0.5） XX clerks are not sufficiently senior and so may lead to fraud or error. (Set credit limits too high, leading to irrecoverable debts, or too low, leading to a loss of sales.) （0.5）
Changes to master file data should be made by a supervisor or above. Each change should be reviewed by a responsible official.  得分点： 执行者级别更高 更高级别人员复核
Select a sample of XX(题目中交易涉及的文件) and inspect for evidence they have been signed by the XX director; obtain the weekly print out of XX(题目中交易涉及的文件)  and inspect for evidence that the XX director has authorized the changes to the system.
No authorization/review. 关键流程没有审批/复核，credit limit, exception report, reconciliation （0.5） This could result in unauthorized issue (题目中未授权的事项). Increase the risk of fraud and assets misappropriation. （0.5）
All XX transaction should be authorized by a responsible officer. Signature or mark shall be left as evidence.  得分点： 需要审批 签名留痕
For a sample of file(与题目总相关的资料) review the signature as the evidence of authorization, and ensure that this was performed by a responsible official. Enquire of XX clerks as to who can set the authorization.
XX director authorizes the bank transfer payment list for XX and only views the total amount of payments to be made.财务总监只看总金额不看明细就批准付款 （0.5） There is a risk that XX could be being paid an incorrect amount, or that sums are being paid to fictitious XX. （0.5）
The XX director should review the whole payments list prior to authorizing. As part of this, he should agree the amounts to be paid to supporting documentation, as well as reviewing the XX names to identify any duplicates or any unfamiliar names. He should evidence her review by signing the bank transfer list.
Review the payments list for evidence of review by the XX director. Enquire of accounts staff what supporting documentation, the XX director requests when undertaking this review.
Substantive procedure专题必背答题模板 Tips for SP答题技巧： 1. 背诵为王， 这部分程序不背就不会写，建议背诵一些通用型的审计程序+科目特殊的程序； 2. 做题时一定要看清题目背景中的要求再写， 比如是否要求某种认定、 或者某种审计方法、是否不允许发函等。  通用性审计程序： Existence/Occurrence Select a sample of ______recorded in _______(账）and physically verify/trace them back to _______ (实地盘点/原始凭证) to confirm existence/occurrence.
账 实
PPE NCA register Site visit/factory
Inventory Inventory sheet/record Physical count
Receivable Receivable balance/listing GDN invoice sales order
Payable Payable balance/listing GRN invoice
Sales Sales ledger GDN invoice sales order
Purchase and expense ※ Purchase ledger GRN invoice purchase order Completeness • Obtain the breakdown/schedule of ____, cast it and agree to ___ (账) general ledger/trial balance/financial statement to confirm completeness and accuracy . • Select a sample of ______ (原始凭证/实物资产) and trace them to ________ (账) to confirm completeness.  Presentation • Review the financial statements disclosures relating to XX科目 to ensure they comply with IAS XX. （准则号可以不写，不写不扣分，但写错了不给分） Accuracy, valuation and allocation • Select a sample of _____XX and agree amount to invoice to confirm accuracy. • Select a sample of XX and recalculate the XX to ensure that the XX is correct to confirm accuracy. Rights and obligation • Verify rights and obligations by agreeing the XX to a invoice in the name of XX Co. • Select a sample of XX and perform confirmation to confirm R&O. 分析性程序在SP中的应用：（receivable, payable, sales, purchase and expense适用） Variance analysis • Compare the overall level/breakdown of XX against prior years and budget and investigate any significant fluctuations. Ratio analysis • Calculate the gross profit margin/周转天数 for the client and compare this to the prior year and investigate any significant fluctuations. Proof in total • Perform a proof in total calculation for XX, creating an expectation of the average price
multiplied by the increased XX volumes for this year. Compare the expectation result to actual amount and investigate any significant fluctuations. 下列表格中的程序是考试中常见的考点，需要考生重点背诵： SP for PPE – Additions （高频必背） 必背 New Purchases • Obtain a breakdown of additions, cast the list and agree to the non-current asset register to confirm completeness of PPE.  • For a sample of PPE trace back to the non-current assets register and general ledger to confirm completeness. 【实→账】 • Select a sample of additions recorded in the register and physically verify them via site visits to confirm existence. 【账→实】 • Select a sample of additions and agree cost to supplier invoice to confirm valuation. • Agree the title of a supplier invoice of the addition of PPE to the non-current asset register to verify rights and obligations. 选背 Capital Expenditure • Inspect the repairs and maintenance account in the general ledger for items of a capital nature to confirm completeness of additions. • Review the list of additions to confirm that they relate to capital expenditure items rather than repairs and maintenance to confirm classification. SP for PPE – Disposals （中频） 必背 • Obtain a breakdown of disposals, cast the list and agree all assets removed from the non-current assets register to confirm existence. • Select a sample of disposals and agree sale proceeds to supporting documentation such as sundry sales invoices. (Accuracy) • Recalculate the profit/loss on disposal and agree to the trial balance and statement of profit or loss.  (Accuracy) • Recalculate the depreciation charge for a sample of disposals to confirm the calculations are correctly applied as per the company policy.  (Accuracy) • Review the disclosure of the disposals in the draft financial statements and ensure it is in line with IAS 16 Property, Plant and Equipment. (Presentation) SP for PPE - Subsequent Measurement （中频） 必背 Depreciation • Select a sample of PPE and recalculate the depreciation charge to ensure that the non-current assets register is correct to confirm accuracy. • Discuss with management the rationale for the changes to property, plant and equipment (PPE) depreciation rates, useful lives, residual values and depreciation methods. Revaluation • Agree the revalued amounts to the valuation report provided by the valuer to confirm valuation assertion.  • Review the financial statements disclosures relating to the revaluation to ensure they comply with IAS 16. (Presentation)
选背 Revaluation • Review the valuation report and consider if all assets in the same category have been revalued in line with IAS 16 Property, Plant and Equipment.  • Consider the competence and capability of the valuer, by assessing through enquiry their qualification, membership of a professional body and experience in valuing these types of assets. • Review the assumptions and method adopted by the valuer in undertaking the revaluation to confirm the reasonableness and compliance with principles of IAS 16. SP for receivables （高频必背） 必背 • Calculate average receivable days and compare this to prior year, investigate any significant differences. • Review the after-date cash receipts (期后回款测试) and follow through to pre year-end receivable balances. • Inspect the aged receivables report to identify any slow-moving balances, discuss these with the credit control manager to assess whether an allowance or write down is necessary. 选背 • Review customer correspondence to identify any balances which are in dispute or unlikely to be paid and discuss with management. • Review board minutes of client to assess whether there is any material disputed receivables. • Discuss with the finance director the rationale for not providing against any receivables and consider the reasonableness of the allowance. SP for Inventory (cost vs NRV) （高频必背） 必背 Valuation - Cost • For a sample of inventory items, obtain the relevant cost sheets and confirm raw material costs to recent purchase invoices, labour costs to time sheets or wage records and overheads allocated are of a production nature.  Valuation - NRV indicator • Perform a review of the average inventory days for the current year and compare to prior year inventory days. Discuss any significant variations with management. • Review aged inventory reports and identify any slow-moving goods, discuss with management why these items have not been written down. 【案例描述存在defective inventory】 1. 核对成本；2. 询问NRV逻辑；3. 通过期后销售评估NRV；4. 减值处理。 1. Agree the cost of defects to supporting documentation to confirm the raw material cost, labor cost and any overheads attributed to the cost. 2. For the defective inventory, discuss with management their plans for disposing these goods, and why they believe these goods have a NRV of $XX. 3. If any has been sold post year end, agree to the sales invoice to assess NRV. 4. Confirm if the final adjustment is $XX and discuss with management if this adjustment has been made; if so, follow through the write down to confirm.
选背 • Compare the gross profit margin for current year with prior year. Fluctuations in gross profit margin could be due to inventory valuation issues. Discuss significant variations in the margin with management. • Examine post year-end credit notes to determine whether there have been returns which could signify that a write down is required. SP for Provision - Customer Claim （高频必背） 必背 1.【是否由于过去事项导致现时义务】 • Review the correspondence from the customers the case to assess whether the client has a present obligation as a result of a past event. 2.【经济利益流出可能性】 • Review board minutes to understand whether the directors believe that the claim will be successful or not. 3.【金额可靠计量】 • Review the post year-end period to assess whether any payments have been made to any of the claimants. 4.【披露】 • Review the financial statement disclosures relating to the provision to ensure they are in compliance with IAS 37 Provisions, Contingent Liabilities and Contingent Assets. 选背 • Send an enquiry letter to the lawyers of the client to obtain their view as to the probability of the claim being successful. (经济利益流出可能性) • Obtain a written representation from management that they believe the provision is valued appropriately and is complete. (金额可靠计量) SP for Provision - Redundancy Provisions （高频必背） 必背 1.【是否由于过去事项导致现时义务】 • Discuss with the management as to whether they have formally announced their intention to make their employees redundant, to confirm that a present obligation exists at the year end. • If announced before the year end, review supporting documentation to verify that the decision has been formally announced. 2.【经济利益流出可能性】 • Review the board minutes to ascertain whether it is probable that the redundancy payments will be paid. 3.【金额可靠计量】 • Review the post year-end cash book to identify whether any redundancy payments have been made, compare actual payments to the amounts provided to assess whether the provision is reasonable. 4.【披露】 • Review the disclosure of the redundancy provision to ensure compliance with IAS 37 Provision, Contingent Liabilities and Contingent Assets. 选背 【金额可靠计量】 • Recalculate the redundancy provision to confirm completeness and agree components of the calculation to supporting documentation such as employee contracts.
• Obtain a breakdown of the redundancy calculations by employee and cast it to ensure completeness and agree to trial balance.  SP for Revenue （中频） 必背 【AP】- variance analysis • Compare the overall level of revenue against prior years and budget for the year and investigate any significant fluctuations. (总数) • Obtain a schedule of sales for the year broken down into the main product categories and compare this to the prior year breakdown and for any unusual movements, discuss with management. (明细-业务/产品) 【AP】- ratio analysis • Calculate the final gross profit margin for XX Co and compare this to the prior year and investigate any significant fluctuations. 【cut-off】 • Select a sample of dispatch notes both pre and post year end; follow these through to sales invoices in the correct accounting period to ensure that cut-off has been correctly applied. 【accuracy】 • For a sample of invoices, recalculate invoice totals including any discounts and sales tax. 选背 【AP】- proof in total • Perform a proof in total calculation for revenue, creating an expectation of the average price for the main paint products multiplied by the increased sales volumes for this year. This expectation should be compared to actual revenue and any significant fluctuations should be investigated. 【classification】 • Select a sample of XX sales made in the final week prior to the year end and where goods were dispatched post year end, confirm that the sale proceeds received are recorded as deferred income (contract liability) rather than as revenue. SP for bank and cash （高频必背） 必背 • Obtain a bank confirmation letter from XX Co's banks for all of its bank accounts. • Agree all accounts listed on the bank confirmation letter to XX Co's bank reconciliations the trial balance/general ledger to ensure completeness of bank balances. • Obtain the year-end bank reconciliations and cast to ensure mathematical accuracy. • Agree the balance per cash book on the year-end bank reconciliation statements to the cash book/trial balance/financial statements. (accuracy) • Agree the balance per the bank reconciliations to the year-end bank confirmation letter and bank statements. 建议背诵 （如果考reconciliation• Trace all the outstanding lodgements 在途存款 to the pre year-end cash book, post year-end bank statement and also to the paying-in book 存款簿 pre year end.
一定要写这里面的程序） • Trace all unpresented cheques 未承兑汇票 through to a pre year-end cash book and post year-end bank statement. For any unusual amounts or significant delays, obtain explanations from management. • Examine any old unpresented cheques to assess if they need to be written back冲回 to the payables ledger as they are no longer valid. SP for payable （中频） 必背 • Obtain a listing of trade payables from the purchase ledger and agree to the general ledger and the financial statements. (Completeness) • Select a sample of purchase invoices, and trace it to GRN and purchase ledger or general ledger to ensure it is completely recorded in the ledger. (Completeness) • Calculate average trade payable days and compare this to prior year, investigate any significant differences. (Completeness) 选背 • Compare the total trade payables and list of accruals against prior year and investigate any significant differences. (Completeness) • Review the list of trade payables against prior years supplier by supplier to identify any significant omissions. (Completeness) • Reconcile the total of purchase ledger accounts with the purchase ledger control account. (Completeness) • Reperform a sample of supplier statement reconciliations and agree these to the payables ledger balances. Investigate any reconciling items.  SP for purchase and expense （低频） 必背 • Review monthly purchases and other expenses to identify any significant fluctuations and discuss with management.（SAP） • Review the annual purchases and other expenses on a line-by-line basis, compare to the prior year and investigate any significant differences.（SAP） • Select a sample of goods received notes (GRNs) from throughout the year. Agree them to purchase invoices and the purchase day book to ensure the completeness of purchases.（TOD） 选背 • Calculate the operating profit and gross profit margins and compare them to last year and budget and investigate any significant differences.（SAP） • Select a sample of post year-end expense invoices and ensure that any expenses relating to the current year have been accrued.（TOD） • Select a sample of expense payments from the cash book and trace to the relevant expense account in the general ledger to ensure the expense has been included and classified correctly. (completeness & classification)（TOD）  SP for IA（R&D expense）（低频） 必背 • For the new developing projects, discuss with management the details of each project along with the stage of development and whether it has been capitalized or expensed. • For those expensed as research, agree the costs incurred to invoices and supporting documentation and to inclusion in profit or loss. • For those capitalized as development, agree costs incurred to invoices. 选背 • Confirm technically feasible and intention to complete the project by discussion with
development managers or review of feasibility reports. • Review market research reports to confirm XX Co has the ability to sell the product once complete and probable future economic benefits will arise. • Review the costs, projected revenue and cash flow budgets for the each of the projects to confirm XX Co has adequate resources to complete the development stage and that probable future economic benefits exist. Agree the budgets to supporting documentation. SP for inventory count-Before the inventory count （低频） 必背 • Review the prior year audit files to identify whether there were any particular warehouses where significant inventory issues arose last year. • Discuss with management whether any of the warehouses this year are new, or have experienced significant control issues. • Decide which of the warehouses the audit team members will attend, basing this on materiality and risk of each site. • Discuss with the management and decide the timing of the count SP for inventory count-During the inventory count 必背 • Observe the counting teams to confirm whether the inventory count instructions are being followed correctly. • Observe the procedures for movements of inventory during the count, to confirm that all movements have ceased. • Select a sample of inventory and perform test counts from inventory sheets to warehouse (existence) and from warehouse to inventory sheets (completeness).  SP for Directors’ emoluments （中频） 必背 • Obtain a schedule of the directors’ bonus and cast the schedule to ensure its accuracy. Agree the amount to that disclosed in the financial statements. (Presentation) • Obtain a written representation from management confirming the completeness of directors’ remuneration including the bonus. • Review the disclosures made regarding the bonus paid to directors and assess whether these are in compliance with local legislation. (Presentation) 选背 • Review the schedule of current liabilities and confirm the bonus accrual is included as a year-end liability. (Completeness) • Agree the individual bonus payments to the post year-end payroll records. (Occurence) SP for bank loan （高频） 必背 • Obtain a schedule of opening and closing loans detailing any changes during the year. Cast the schedule to confirm its accuracy and agree the closing balances to the trial balance and draft financial statements. (completeness) • Obtain direct confirmation at the year end from the loan provider of the outstanding balance and any security provided; agree confirmed amounts to the loan schedule and financial statements. • Review the disclosure of non-current liabilities in the draft financial statements, including any security provided and assess whether these are in accordance with accounting standards and local legislation.
选背 • For the new loan taken out in the year, review the loan agreement to confirm the amount borrowed, the repayment terms and the interest rate applicable. • For any loan payments made during the year, agree the cash outflow to the cash book and bank statements. • Recalculate the split of the loan repayment made between interest and principal, recalculate interest and agree to inclusion in statement of profit or loss, and outstanding loan balance reduced by principal amount repaid.  常考简答题背诵清单 Tips: 1.考情分析：纯背诵的文字简答题在考试中约占10-15分。 2.重要程度：重要程度分别用五个星级来表示： Ø 3星级及以上是考生必须要背诵掌握的。 Ø 2星级考生最好熟悉几遍，考试出现可以写出大部分要点。 Ø 1星级考试出现过， 但是考试频率较低， 考生需要理解有印象， 如果抽到该题目不至于无话可写。  内审工作类型 ★★ Describe assignments the internal auditors of xx Co can carry out. (5分) Value for money assignments 经济效益 Review of 3E (Economy/Efficient/Effectiveness) Operational audits 运营 Review of the efficiency and effectiveness of operations The audit of IT systems IT Review over the overall IT environment and controls Financial audit 财务 Review on financial information Compliance audits 合规 Review over compliance with laws and regulations Fraud investigations 舞弊调查 Investigate for suspected fraud as well as review controls in place to prevent or detect fraud Customer experience audits 客户体验 Assess the level of customer service  审计师面对利益冲突如何应对 ★★★ Explain the safeguards which XX & Co should implement to ensure conflict of interest is appropriately managed. (5分)  a. 先同时告知几方客户，获取同意书； Notify both xx and xx, and obtain consent from each client’s management. b. 把不同项目交给不同团队去审计； Appoint separate engagement teams to each client. c. 还要防止不同团队进行信息交换；
Prevent access to information from each engagement team, eg. strict physical separation. d. 还要让员工签署保密协议； Sign confidentiality agreements for all members of each engagement team. e. 以上是否达成，需要定期监督复核。 Regular monitor by a senior who’s not involved in either engagement team.  审计的先决条件 ★★★★ Describe the pre-conditions for audit. (3-4分) a. 管理层编制财报的时候，使用的财报框架，是否是可以接受 Whether financial reporting framework used by management in preparing F/S is acceptable. b. 获取管理层声明书，让管理层写清楚他承认并理解如下责任： Obtain written representation saying it acknowledges and understands its responsibilities: - 按照恰当财报框架编制F/S Preparing F/S in accordance in applicable financial reporting framework - 设计内控并保证其有效实施 Establishing and ensure effectiveness of IC - 给审计师提供必要信息 Providing auditors with necessary information 审计业务约定书目的及必须包含的条款 ★★★★ Explain the purpose of an engagement letter and list four items to be included in it. (4分) 目的 a. 给审计师及客户双方提供了关于审计业务条款的书面协议 provide a written agreement of the audit engagement terms between management/TCWG and auditors b. 确认了双方的共识，避免双方的误解 confirm common understanding and avoiding misunderstanding between both parties 条款/内容 a. 审计目标、范围：objectives & scope b. 双方责任：auditors’ + management’s responsibilities (也可以拆成两点写) c. 财务报表编制基础：applicable financial reporting framework for preparing F/S d. 预期报告形式内容：expected form and content of reports 项目质量管理：指导、监督、复核★ Describe auditor's responsibilities on supervising and reviewing the audit work. (4分) 监督人对项目具有整体的监督和复核作用。 The supervisor is responsible for overall supervision and review of the audit. a. 监督：跟踪项目进度，持续评估成员胜任能力 - Supervisors should track the progress, monitor it against the plan, to assess whether the objectives have been achieved. - Supervisors should monitor the competence and capabilities of the team members, and provide coach if necessary. b. 复核：工作是否遵守准则规范及法律法规，证据是否足以支撑得出的结论
- Supervisors should review the work to ensure its compliance with the ISAs and the regulatory requirements.  - Supervisors should review to ensure the sufficient appropriate evidence obtained to support the conclusions reached. 审计计划的优点 ★★  Explain the benefits of audit planning. (4分)  a. 帮助审计师适当关注到审计的重要领域 devote appropriate attention to important areas b. 帮助审计师及时发现并解决潜在的问题 identify & resolve potential problems in time c. 帮助审计师更有条理更高效的管理项目 properly manage the audit engagement so that it is effective and efficient d. 促进对组内成员的指导、监督，及对审计工作的复核 facilitate the direction and supervision of team members and the review of the audit work e. 降低审计风险 (→定义&构成也需要背) 至可接受低水平 reduce audit risk (risk of giving an inappropriate audit opinion) to an acceptable level 审计风险的定义及组成部分 ★★ Define audit risk and the components of audit risk. (4分) • 审计风险 → 当财报存在重大错报时，审计师发表不恰当意见的风险 The risk that the auditor expresses an inappropriate audit opinion when the financial statements are materially misstated.  • 审计风险的构成 → 固有风险 * 控制风险 * 检查风险 The audit risk is comprised of inherent risk, control risk and detection risk. • 固有风险 → 在考虑相关内控之前，由于公司性质导致固有存在的风险 The risk that is inherent due to the nature of the entity, before considering of IC. • 控制风险 → 内控没有及时防止、发现或纠正重大错报的风险 The risk that IC will not prevent, detect and correct material misstatements in time. • 检查风险 → 审计师执行的程序没有发现重大错报的风险 (包含抽样&非抽样风险) The risk that the audit procedures will not detect material misstatements. It comprises sampling & non-sampling risk. 审计师对于舞弊及错误的责任★★★★ Describe the responsibilities in relation to the prevention and detection of fraud and error.  (4分) • 有责任获取合理保证：关于整个财报不存在不管是由于舞弊还是错误造成的重大错报 Auditors are responsible for obtaining reasonable assurance that, no matter it is due to fraud or error, F/S as a whole are free from material misstatement. • 因此需要获取充分适当的证据，来评估由于舞弊而造成的财报重大错报的风险 Auditors need to obtain sufficient appropriate evidence, to assess the risks of material misstatement due to fraud. • 同时审计师在识别舞弊时需要始终保持专业的怀疑态度 Auditors are responsible for maintaining professional scepticism throughout the audit. • 整个组需要了解关于舞弊及错误的风险及责任，在组内需要及时沟通讨论 The whole team needs to be aware of the risks and responsibilities for fraud and error, and discussions need to be held within the team.
总体审计策略的内容★ Identify THREE main areas, other than audit risks, which should be included in the audit strategy document for XX Co, and provide an example for each. (3分)  • 项目性质特点，举栗：编制财报时使用了什么财报框架 Characteristics of the engagement For example, what financial reporting framework it is using • 时间及沟通形式，举栗：客户的时间计划，会议的组织形式 Timing of the audit and nature of communication For example, entity's timetable for reporting, expected forms of the organization of meetings • 重要事项，举栗：重要性水平的制定 Significant factors For example, determination of materiality • 现有资源的利用程度，举栗：挑选项目组成员并分配工作  Extent of resources For example, selection of engagement team and assignment of work to them 重要性水平及实际执行重要性水平的定义 ★★ Define and explain materiality and performance materiality Materiality • 如果某个错报，不管是单独还是加总，会影响使用者的经济决策，那该错报是重大的 The misstatement is material if, individual or in total, influences users’ economic decisions. • 同时考虑数量和性质 Both amount and nature should be considered. Performance Materiality • 目的：降低(未更正错报)和(未发现错报)超出重要性水平的风险 Reduce the risk that sum of uncorrected & undetected misstatements exceeds materiality. • 因此：实际执行重要性水平需要<财报整体的重要性水平 Performance materiality should be less than materiality for F/S as a whole.  描述下内控的5个组成部分并解释 ★★★★ Component Description Control environment “Set the tone” by creating a culture of honest and ethical behavior through attitudes, awareness and actions of management.  Risk assessment process How management identifies risks and decides upon actions to manage them. Information system and communication Consists of infrastructures, software, people, procedure and data, which are used to record, process and report transactions.  Control activities The policies and procedures that help ensure that management directives are carried out.  Monitoring of controls Assess the design and operation of controls over time, ongoing monitoring is part of regular management activity.   描述记录内控的三种方法和优缺点？★★★★  定义 Advantages Disadvantages
Narrative notes
Narrative notes consist of a written description of the system; they would detail what occurs in the system at each stage and would include any controls which operate at each stage.
•Relatively simple to record and can improve understand by all audit team members.  • Can be used for any system as the method’s flexibility.
•Narrative notes may be time consuming, especially if the system is complex.  •This method is hard to find missing internal controls as the notes give details but don't clearly show control problem.
Flowcharts
Flowcharts are a graphic illustration of the physical flow of information through the internal control system. Flowlines usually demonstrate the sequence of events and standard symbols and other symbols represent the inputs and outputs to a process.
source_doc: ACCA:aa:objective:1-24年11月更新-高顿ACCA AA主观题得分要点-全文背诵.pdf#18

stem_zh: 1.Can be prepared quickly by an experienced user  2.It is easy to follow and review as the information is presented in a standard form   3.Highlighting the standout points of control and any deficiencies in the system
source_doc: ACCA:aa:objective:1-24年11月更新-高顿ACCA AA主观题得分要点-全文背诵.pdf#19

stem_zh:
1.This method suitable for describing standard systems. The unusual transactions are not suitable. 2.This is difficult for major amendment. 3.This may time consuming by charting areas that are no audit significance.
Questionnaires
The questionnaires contain a list of questions. ICQs are used to assess whether controls exist. However, ICEQs assess the effectiveness of the controls in place.
• Questionnaires are quick and easy to prepare. • If drafted thoroughly, they can ensure all controls are considered. • Identify the key controls which they are most likely to test during control testing
• This may contain a large number of irrelevant controls.  • This may not include unusual controls.  • The client may be able to overstate controls.
描述内控重大缺陷的定义，以及在判断内控缺陷是否重大时应该考虑的因素？★★★★★ A significant deficiency in internal control is a deficiency or combination of deficiencies in internal control and this involves the professional judgment of the auditor. The importance of these deficiencies can attract the attention of those charged with governance.  The factor: ² The likelihood of the deficiencies leading to material misstatements in the financial statements in the future.  ² The influence to loss or fraud of the related asset or liability.  ² The financial statement amounts exposed to the deficiencies.  ² The importance of the controls to the financial reporting process.  ² The interaction of the deficiency with other deficiencies in internal control.
解释在审计期间为什么审计师和治理层沟通是非常重要的？并给出3个沟通的例子。★★★★ Importance： ² It assists the auditor and those charged with governance in understanding matters related to the audit.  ² It helps the auditor in obtaining，from those charged with governance, information relevant to the audit. For example, those charged with governance may assist the auditor in understanding the entity and its environment, in identifying specific transactions or events.  ² It helps those charged with governance in fulfilling their responsibility to oversee the financial reporting process, thereby reducing the risks of material misstatement of the financial statements.  Matters： ² The auditor should explain the planned approach to the audit as well as the audit timetable.  ² Any key audit risks identified during the planning stage should be communicated.  ² Significant matters arising during the audit, as well as significant accounting adjustments. ² During the audit, any significant deficiencies in the internal control system identified should be communicated in writing.  ² If any suspected frauds are identified during the audit, these must be communicated.  ² If the auditors are intending to make any modifications to the audit opinion, these should be communicated to those charged with governance.  讨论成立审计委员会的好处？★★★ ² It will help to improve the objectivity of the financial reporting of the client.  ² It will save more time of management and spend more time on core business practices. ² It can provide access for auditor to report issues to audit committee., and this will improve the independence of internal auditors. ² It can improve the internal control environment of the company. ² It will provide a formal link between the auditor, the NED and the shareholders to consult.

stem_zh:
AA答题遵循“三流一致”——打分规则 VS 高分答案 VS 背诵套话
满分答案示例
（拆解答题框架）
AA答题遵循“三流一致”——打分规则 VS 高分答案 VS 背诵套话
42页背诵资料
（拆解答题内容：
怎么写、写什么、用什么词语）
满分答案示例
AA - 0分答案分析
Audit risk
①没有正确找到风险
②没有解释风险
③写了影响，但没有逻辑
④用词不精确，表达高估时最好使用 “be overstated”
Audit Response
①应对措施太笼统，显然和背景案例没什么关联
②应对措施不具体，怎么check？具体怎么做？先做
什么再做什么？
③尽量不要用check，题目的意思就是要你回答怎么
check，请替换成更明确的动词：
obtain/observe/discuss/enquire/... + 宾语（具体事宜）
PM主观题得分关键：计算+文字并重
例：校内考32(a)Analyse the financial performance财务表现（计算） of the two airlines, including reasons for
the differences分析差异的原因（文字） in the two businesses’ performance.
打分规则
拆解答题结构：计算+评价+原因
高分答案：
①计算指标选择正确（不同指标分别对应盈利性/流动性/风险)
②计算指标没有胡编乱造（个别同学自己杜撰胡编了一些无意义的Ratio）
③计算指标全部计算正确
④*联系案例数据，计算符合题意的Ratio，比如：入座率、每单位燃油载
客量等（这些指标很少有同学想到！）
PM主观题得分关键：计算+文字并重
例：校内考32(a)Analyse the financial performance财务表现（计算） of the two airlines, including reasons for
the differences分析差异的原因（文字） in the two businesses’ performance.
高分答案：
①根据计算结果，做出正确的评价
②结合案例，分析原因（很多同学没有这一步！）
打分规则
拆解答题结构：计算+评价+原因

stem_zh:
审计风险
Audit risk
找对风险 0.5 分+合理解释 0.5 分
Response = Evidence = Procedure
1-2 条应对措施 1 分
四个关键点
1) Materiality & Conclusion
2) IAS/IFRS, Lower of Cost & NRV
3) Risk or Misstatement (与 2 相反)
4) Impact on FS
ASP 原则
Action 动作 Review
Source 凭证  Invoice
Purpose 目的 To confirm amount is correct
获取审计证据的方法 AEIOU
Analytical procedure  分析性程序，Ratio 比一比
Enquiry 口头询问 +书面询问 (External confirmation)
Inspection  凭证 +现场检查 (Physical inspection)
Observation  观察 +重新执行 (Reperformance)
Recalculation  重新计算
注意：不能写 Check
认定表 Assertion - Account Balances "CARE CP"
Completeness
完整性
所有应当记录的资产、负债和所有者权益均已记录
Accuracy, Valuation and
Allocation
计价和分摊
资产、负债和所有者权益以恰当的金额包括在财务报表
中，与之相关的计价或分摊调整已恰当记录
Rights and Obligations
权利和义务
主体拥有或控制资产的权利，负债是主体的偿还义务
Existence
存在性
资产、负债和所有者权益是存在的
Classification
分类
资产、负债和所有者权益已记录于恰当的账户
Presentation
列报和披露
认定表 Assertion - Transactions and Events "COCO AP"
Completeness
完整性
所有应当记录的交易和事项均已记录
Occurrence
发生性
记录的交易或事项已发生且与主体有关
Classification
分类
交易和事项已记录于恰当的账户
Cut-Off
截止性
交易和事项已记录于正确的会计期间
Accuracy
准确性
与已记录的交易和事项有关的金额及其他数据已恰当记录
Presentation
列报和披露
RoMM of assertion level (IAS/IFRS)
IAS 2 Inventory
通常，存货减值
2019/Q17 存货价值=销售价格-利润率，接近成本
准则 Lower of Cost and NRV (很有可能是 0)
风险 No/Inadequate impairment
影响 Overstate asset and profit
应对(简) Discuss with management regarding NRV
Review management impairment schedule/calculation
IAS 2 Inventory
存货盘点
准则 All inventory must be counted at least once a year
风险 Omitted or counted twice
Significant exception, record higher/ lower
影响 Misstate inventory balance
应对(简) Review timetable/ control/ adjustment
Review GRN/ GDN and follow through into inventory record
Request full year-end inventory count
IAS 2 Inventory
WIP 估值
准则 POC (Percentage of completion) 完工百分比%
风险 Wrongly estimate POC
影响 Misstate inventory value
应对(简) Consult expert, e.g. production manager regarding POC
IAS 16 PPE
Depreciation 金额和时间
准则 Available for use 计提折旧的时间点
风险 Not properly charged (UEL, Dep method, Residual value)
影响 Misstate asset and profit
应对(简) Discuss with management about dep policy to assess reasonableness
Recalculate dep schedule
IAS 16 PPE
PPE may not have been received by the y.e. ***
准则 Only PPE which physically exist at the y.e. should be included
风险 PPE not yet received, already capitalised
影响 Overstate PPE
应对(简) Physical inspection
IAS 16 PPE
Expenditure on PPE - Revenue expenditure 收益性 支出  vs Capital
expenditure 资本性支出 *****
准则 Probable future economic benefit  inflow & Measure reliably -
capitalised
风险 Not correctly allocated between revenue and capital expenditure
Wrongly capitalised before recognition conditions are met
影响 Misstate expenses and asset
应对(简) Review breakdown to assess the nature; agree to invoice
IAS 16 PPE
Dismantling cost/ Decommissioning cost 弃置费用
准则 PV of the dismantling cost should be capitalised as PPE
Dr PPE Cr Provision
风险 Estimation of UEL, dismantling cost, discount factor, FC charged etc.
影响 Misstate asset, liability, expenses
应对(简) Discuss with management regarding reasonableness of the above
assumptions
IAS 16 PPE
Revaluation 重估
准则 CV and FV differ materially，“FV”；向上 OCI 向下 PL；Entire class
should be revalued
风险 FV not reasonable
Partial revaluation
影响 Understate OCI and PPE
应对(简) Discuss with management the process adopted for undertaking the
valuation
(Expert) reliance on work done?
IAS 16 PPE
Disposal - Gain or loss *****
Dr Cash 对价=市场价值，公允价值【默认是合理的】
Cr PPE 账面价值 → 说明：太低了，折旧折快了
Cr Gain 大额的收益
准则 Selling price vs CV
风险 May not have been calculated correctly
SIGNIFICANT gain or loss indicates dep policy inappropriate
影响 Misstate profit
应对(简) Agree selling price to sales contract
Agree carrying value to PPE register
Recalculate gain or loss on disposal
Discuss with management regarding reasonableness of dep policy
IAS 38 IA
Marketing/Promotional expenses/Advertisement 市场推广费用
准则 Cannot capitalise
风险 Capitalise as IA, should be expensed off
影响 Overstate asset and profit
应对(简) Discuss with management the rationale for capitalization
Review invoice to confirm all the advertisement were shown before y.e.
(否则就是下一年的费用了)
IAS 38 IA
Research and development 研发支出
Probable future economic
benefit inflows
Market research report
Intention to complete BOD Minutes of meeting
Written representation
Resource to complete Cash balance, Gearing, Government grant
agreement
Ability to use or sell    Government approval
Technically viable R&D staff, Side effects
Expenditure can be measured
reliably
Material – Invoice
Labor – HR record
Overhead – Invoice
风险：Distinguish between R(Expenses) & D(PIRATE)
应对(简)：Discuss with management regarding condition met +表格中的具体方法
IAS 38 IA
Amortisation 摊销
Finite life 专利权、特许经营权、药方等
准则 CV = Cost – Accumulated Amortisation 通常直线法
风险 Incorrectly charge amortisation
影响 Misstate expenses and asset
应对(简) Discuss with management about amortisation policy to assess
reasonableness UEL/method
Recalculate amortisation schedule
Indefinite life 商标等
准则 CV = Cost - ANNUAL impairment test
风险 No/ Inadequate annual impairment
影响 Misstate expenses and asset
应对(简) (如果有负面事件) Change to finite life?
IAS 37 Provision
Legal case 未决诉讼
准则 Present obligation (legal/constructive), probable FEB outflow, Measure
reliably 默认满足–> Best estimate
风险 Condition met, but no provision is recognised
影响 Understate expenses and liability
应对(简) Correspondence with lawyer
IAS 37 Provision
Warranty 质量保证，保修
准则 Present obligation (legal/constructive), probable FEB outflow, Measure
reliably 默认满足–> Expected value
风险 Amount & Probability reasonable
影响 Understate expenses and liability
应对(简) Discuss with management about assumption used
Recalculate amount of the provision
IAS 37 Provision
Restructuring - sell a business 卖掉一个“工厂”
准则 Provision can be made, when there is binding sales agreement  (legal
obligation)
风险 No provision, timing of provision?
影响 Understate expenses and liability
应对(简) Review sales agreement to confirm timing of legal obligation
Recalculate amount of the provision
IAS 37 Provision
Restructuring - close a business 关掉一个“工厂”
准则 Provision can be made, when there is constructive obligation
风险 No obligation but provision made
影响 Overstate expenses and liability
应对(简) Review the announcement
Recalculate amount of the provision
IAS 37 Provision
Restructuring
准则 Provision includes direct cost (redundancy, lease termination), exclude
ongoing cost (relocation, new system)
风险 Amount inaccurate
影响 Misstate expenses and liability
应对(简) Obtain breakdown of the provision to confirm nature
Confirmation with lawyer regarding possible ongoing legal actions
Borrowing
准则 Split between NCL & CL
Amortised cost (FC @EIR; Payment @Par value*Coupon rate)
风险 Not split
影响 Misstate liability
应对(简) Review amortisation schedule
Loan covenant
风险 Breached minimum target covenant
Loan would be instantly repayable and classified as a current liability
影响 Misstate liability, Cashflow problem, Going concern uncertainty
应对(简) Maintain professional skepticism and be alert to the risk
Product recall and refund 产品召回+退款 *****
(1) Faulty goods/inventory
准则 Lower of cost and NRV (很有可能是 0)
风险 No/Inadequate impairment loss
影响 Overstate profit and asset
应对(简) Discuss with management regarding NRV
Review management impairment schedule
(2) Money
(2-1) Money received, e.g., cash sales, TR already collected –> 退钱
准则 Provision for refund/ Refund liability
风险 Provision not recognised
影响 Understate expenses and liability
应对(简) Announcement of recall
Discuss with management about amount and assumption, recalculate
provision
(2-2) Money NOT received, e.g., TR NOT collected –>收不回了，坏账
准则 TR impairment, CV and RA recoverable amount = 0
风险 No/ Inadequate impairment
影响 Understate expenses, overstate asset
应对(简) Discuss with management, recalculate impairment
Post year-end cash receipts testing = Subsequent receipt
(3) Reverse sales and cost of sales
准则 (销售) Dr TR Cr Revenue
(结转成本) Dr COS Cr Inventory –> 以上两笔分录撤销（反向）
风险 Not reversed
影响 Overstate revenue and COS
应对(简) Discuss with management regarding the accounting treatment
Review FS to confirm entries have been reversed
IFRS 15 Revenue from contract with customer
Sales returns 销售退回
准则 Revenue and COS should only be accounted for to the extent that the
company foresees that the goods will not be returned.
For the goods which may be returned, the company should recognise a
refund liability.
风险 Not removed from current year’s sales
影响 Overstate r evenue and COS, understate inventory, understated refund
liability
应对(简) Review a sample of the post year -end sales returns and confirm if they
relate to pre year-end sales, discuss with management about amount and
assumption
IFRS 15 Revenue from contract with customer
Deposit 定金
准则 Recognise revenue when (or as) the entity satisfies a performance
obligation. Deposit should be recognised as deferred income (contract
liability).
风险 Recognised too early, i.e. as revenue immediately
影响 Overstate revenue, understate contract liability
应对(简) Obtain and review the contract to understand the performance
obligations, discuss with management the criteria for determining
whether performance obligations has been satisfied.
金融工具
(1) Preference share 优先股
Redeemable Preference Shares 可赎回优先股 - Liability
Irredeemable Preference Share 不可赎回优先股 – Equity
风险：Wrong classification
影响：Misstate liability and equity
(2) Convertible Bond/ Preference Share 复合型金融工具
Debt 900 + Equity 100= 1000
Dr Cash 1000
Cr FL 900 (现金流折现) - Amortised cost
Cr Equity 100 (剩下的)
风险：Wrong classification
影响：Misstate liability and equity
(3) Trade receivable
准则：Compare CV1000 & RA100, impairment 900
风险：No/ Inadequate impairment
影响：Misstate profit and asset
RoMM of F/S as a whole
(1) FS contains fraud and errors
风险：Some frauds have not been covered
Identified fraud not amended
影响：FS could be misstated
Control risk increased
应对：Maintain professional skepticism and be alert to further fraud and errors
Discuss with management about procedures to identify and rectify the problem
Additional substantive testing should be conducted over the affected areas
(2) New incompetent finance director
风险：FD is not sufficiently competent
影响：Leading to errors
应对：Careful attention should be applied to any changes in accounting policy
(3) Client considering a stock exchange listing next year (Management bias)
风险：Manipulate FS to achieve the desired result
影响：Possible profit, revenue and asset overstatement
应对：Maintain professional skepticism
Review of judgmental decisions and significant one-off journal entries
Detection risk
New client Audit team should be suitably experienced
Review previous auditor's work
Time pressure
3-4 months
Discuss with management to confirm timetable
Maintain professional skepticism
Outsourcing Control over service organisation by client
Communicate with service organisation's auditor, report 1&2
Use IA work 请复习相关知识点
Control risk (Inventory, Payroll)
New system has
been introduced,
data transfer
Document the revised system
Test of control
source_doc: ACCA:aa:objective:3-AA 风险Risk主要考点总结.pdf

stem_zh:
1. A "pre-issuance review" by an independent professional accountant (or regulatory
body) equivalent to an engagement quality review; or

2. A "post-issuance review" (i.e. after issuing the second year's opinion and before the
third year's).
Resign from non-audit services, if any.
Low ball fee
May create:
Self-interest threat, allow but not encourage.
No encouraged. In order t o stay profitable, auditor may inappropriately reduce
extent of work and assign less experienced staff, i.e. compromise quality of audit.
Referral fee
May create:
Self-interest threat, due to additional fee income.
Possible safeguard:
Get client’s consent about the referral fee arrangement.
Ensure quality of the service provider.
案例情境 6 – 审计师与客户的商业关系 Business relationship with audit client , e.g.
Marketing agreement, to distribute each other ’s products or services
May create:
Self-interest threat, as this is direct financial interest.
No safeguard.
Do not enter into such business arrangement.
案例情境 7 – 审计师与客户的私人关系 Personal relationship with audit client
May create:
⁃ Familiarity threat. Fail to maintain professional skepticism.
⁃ Intimidation threat. Pressure to influence auditor’s judgement.
⁃ Self-interest threat. Auditor try to protect family member, thus, not willing to report
material misstatement detected.
Possible safeguard:
Remove the individual.
Maintain professional skepticism.
案例情境 8 – 审计师与客户的雇佣关系
① Long association of senior personnel (KAP Rotation)
② Serving as director (Active audit partner, not retired)
③ Auditor becomes audit client
④ Audit client becomes auditor
⑤ Secondment
Long association of senior personnel (KAP Rotation)
May create:
⁃ Familiarity threat, auditor and client become friends, too accepting of client’s book;
or client becomes familiar with audit procedures, predictable audit.
⁃ Self-interest threat , as a result of an individual’s concern about losing a long -
standing client or an interest in maintaining a close personal relationship with
client.
Possible safeguard:
KAP (Key Aduit Partner) Rotation
For a public interest entity (PIE), an individual cannot act in any of the following roles
for a period of more than 7 cumulative years (“time-on” period):
The engagement partner;
The engagement quality reviewer;
Any other key audit partner role.
After the time-on period, the “cooling-off” period is:
5 years – engagement partner;
3 years – engagement quality reviewer;
2 years – other key audit partner
Serving as director 客户邀请审计师（合伙人）参加 BOD 会议 in substance
May create:
⁃ Self-review threat
⁃ Self-interest threat
⁃ Management threat =Auditor takes management responsibility
No safeguard.
A partner or employee of the firm must not serve as a director or officer of an audit
client of the firm.
Auditor becomes audit client【Before joining】
May create:
Self-interest threat, due to employment negotiation.
Possible safeguard:
The firm should have in place policies and procedures which require members of an
audit team to notify the audit firm when entering employment negotiations with the
client.
Remove the individual from the audit team.
Review the work done so far.
Auditor becomes audit client【After joining】
May create:
⁃ Familiarity threat, for the person is familiar with the firm’s audit methodology.
⁃ Intimidation threat, due to pressure on audit team especially juniors.
Safeguard:
Modify audit plan, to make the audit less predictable.
Assign experienced team, to reduce intimidation threat.
Audit client becomes auditor
May create:
⁃ Self-review threat, if the person used to be responsible for accounting.
⁃ Familiarity threat, because his colleagues is still in accounting works.
Possible safeguard:
Code does not prohibit, but provide timeline, 2 years.
Secondment
May create:
⁃ Self-review threat, when an auditor reviews work which they themselves have
previously performed. Auditor would not be sufficiently objective in performing
the audit and may fail to identify any shortcomings in their own work.
⁃ The loan of personnel to an audit client might also create advocacy or familiarity
threat.
Possible safeguard:
The person should be excluded from audit team.
The work done by the person should be reviewed additionally.
Not giving the person audit responsibility for any function or activity they performed
during the temporary assignment.
案例情境 9 – 审计师为客户提供各种服务
① Accounting and bookkeeping service
② Valuation service
③ Taxation service
⁃ Tax return preparation
⁃ Tax calculation CTL/DTL/DTA
⁃ Tax planning and other tax advisory services
⁃ Assistance in the resolution of tax disputes
④ Corporate finance services
⑤ Recruitment service
⑥ Internal audit service
⑦ Other non-audit service, e.g. KPI report
Accounting and bookkeeping service
May create:
⁃ Self-interest threat, due to fee income.
⁃ Self-review threat. Auditor produce and subsequently audit the figures.
⁃ Management threat. This is management responsibility, and the threat is so
significant that no safeguard can be applied to reduce to acceptable level.
Possible safeguard:
Listing company
Not allowed.
Private company
Not allowed unless:
- The services are of a “routine or mechanical” nature (i.e. requiring little or no
professional judgement); and
- Any threats that are not at an acceptable level are addressed. E.g. Using professionals
who are not audit team members to perform the service. Independent review of the work
done.
Serving as director
May create:
⁃ Self-review threat
⁃ Self-interest threat
Possible safeguard:
Serving as director
May create:
⁃ Self-review threat when a firm performs a valuation for an audit client that is to be
incorporated into the client's financial statements to be audited by the firm.
⁃ Advocacy threat.
Possible safeguard:
Listing company
Material, not allowed.
Private company
Material and subjective, not allowed.
→ If valuation is not material or it is not subjective, service can be provided with
adequate safeguards applied.
Use different teams.
Have a professional to conduct additional review.
Taxation service ⁃Tax return preparation
No threat provided management takes responsibility for the returns including any
judgements which have been made.
Taxation service ⁃Tax calculation CTL/DTL/DTA
May create:
Self-review threat. Auditor reviews work which they themselves have previously
performed, e.g. tax payables figure in FS.
Possible safeguard:
Listing company
Not allowed.
Private company
Use different team
Obtain external advice.
Taxation service ⁃Tax planning and other tax advisory services
May create:
⁃ Self-review threat. Auditor reviews work which they themselves have previously
performed.
⁃ Advocacy threat. Auditor being seen to promote the interests of client with tax
authorities and therefore auditor will be biased in favour of the client.
Possible safeguard:
Listing company
Not allowed.
Private company
Use different team, obtain external advice.
Obtain “pre-clearance” from the tax authorities.
Taxation service ⁃Assistance in the resolution of tax disputes
May create:
⁃ Advocacy threat. Auditor act as advocate of client.
⁃ Self-review threat. Result of the tax dispute may affect FS.
Possible safeguard:
Act as advocate of client in public & amount is material, not allowed.
Use different teams.
Corporate finance services
May create:
⁃ Advocacy threat, auditor speaks on behalf of the client.
⁃ Self-review threat, loan payable & amortised cost will change, auditor prepare the
schedule and audit the schedule.
⁃ Management threat, for this is management responsibility.
Possible safeguard:
Use different teams
Have a professional to conduct additional review
Recruitment service
May create:
⁃ Self-interest threat, as auditor derive additional fee income.
⁃ Familiarity or intimidation threat, if recruit CFO/FD, auditor will be less stringent
in audit.
⁃ Management threat, this may assume management responsibilities.
Possible safeguard:
1) Search for candidates - prohibited
2) Interview
3) Reference check for positions of director, officer or senior management in a position
to exert significant influence over the accounting records or financial statements -
prohibited
4) Review qualification
5) Advise suitability
6) Negotiate salary – prohibited, management duty
7) Decide hiring – prohibited, management duty
Internal audit service
May create:
Self-review threat. Many internal audit services will be directly related to the financial
systems and preparation of the financial statements.
Possible safeguard:
Listing company
Cannot provide internal audit services that relate to:
- significant part of the internal controls over financial reporting;
- financial accounting systems that generate information that is significant to the client's
accounting records or financial statements; or
- amounts or disclosures that are material to the financial statements.
Private company
Use different team.
Other non-audit service, e.g. KPI report
May create:
⁃ Self-interest threat, due to additional fee income.
⁃ Self-review threat. Although the integrated report is not part of audited FS, it will
contain financial KPIs. Client has asked for input relating to reconciliation between
KPIs and financial info, as well as assurance on these KPIs. Auditor will be
reluctant to raise queries or highlight errors in audit later on.
⁃ Management responsibility.
Possible safeguard:
Additional review by independent partner.
案例情境 10 – 利益冲突 Conflict of interest
May affect:
⁃ Confidentiality. Auditor may accidently or purposely disclose sensitive
information to the competitor.
⁃ Objectivity. It may be perceived that auditor cannot offer objective services and
advice to a company where it also audits a competitor.
Possible safeguard:
Inform both clients to get consent.
Use two different teams.
Use of confidentiality agreements.
Adequate procedures should be in place within the firm to prevent access to
information, e.g. strict physical separation of both teams, confidential and secure data
filing.
Regular monitoring of the application of the above safeguards should be undertaken.

1）官方 Pre-Mock 试卷进入网址（ 输入注册 ACCA ID的邮箱号进入） ：
https://cbeptcn.accaglobal.com/
登录不进去官网可以尝试以下步骤：

4、还是登录失败，换台电脑设备再重复以上操作
2）官方 12 月季考 Pre-Mock 试卷，路径图解文件（ ACCA官网上 怎么找试卷和答案）：
链接:
https://pan.baidu.com/s/1Z6cPDVia9FLzuOrYYOXLiQ?pwd=gpcd
提取码: gpcd
3）官方 当 个 考 季 的 Pre-Mock（F 阶段可能做到 1-2 道原题）高顿解析视频 - 仅限 F  阶段
，看课路径：
解析视频等待当个考季官方公布 Pre-Mock 试卷后 2-3个工作日上线，下图以 12月考季为例展
示图解
source_doc: ACCA:aa:objective:F阶段图解-高顿千人模考 & ACCA官方Pre-Mock试卷.pdf#4

stem_zh:
24 年 12 月季考 Pre-Mock 使用路径图解
一、登录官方 Pre-Mock 的网址链接（使用注册 ACCA ID 的邮箱号进入）：
https://cbeptcn.accaglobal.com/
二、找试卷图解
找到科目，注意科目版本的选择（TX/UK，SBR-INT，AAA-INT）
特殊状况：翻页不成功
滑动条同时拉到底等待几秒，才能翻页
结束并退出考试才能在 Mark 菜单中才能看见答案
三、找答案图解
答案是灰色字体“Click here”不太好找，跟着图解走
source_doc: ACCA:aa:objective:当个考季官方Pre-Mock 试卷路径图解.pdf
